svg.title: Map of the Known World - Made by Abjiklam
svg.desc: A map of the Known World from "A Song of Ice and Fire". This map covers the following coordinates (parentheses indicate repeating digits): - from 73.8(63)°N to 1.897(72)°S - from 30.0 °W to 83.(63) °E
